description: The EyeTrackingStreamManager component uses streaming data from the ValueStream data type (seen in the user Inspector) to control the left and right eyes on a user's avatar.

fields.User: The focused user to get streaming data from.
fields.ConvergenceDistance: The eye distance data from the headset.
fields.IsEyeTrackingActive: Returns true if the eyes are being tracked from the headset.
fields.LeftEyeStreams: A set of fields for the left eye.
fields.RightEyeStreams: A set of fields for the right eye.
